actual_zone_zero_compliance_share.rationale: Base centered at the 98% commitment per the actual-vs-commitment default. Asymmetric downside captures Risk 1 (contraflow blockage, 2–5% tech-failure drop) and Risk 6 (5–10% public-compliance shortfall propagating to vehicle exit); upside capped by the 100% mathematical ceiling.

actual_drf_spend_usd.rationale: Bottom-up estimate of 24-hour spend on contraflow enforcement, airlift, N95, fuel caches, and Guard activation; base just below the $500M envelope; upper bound captures Risk-2 emergency-mobilization overrun ($500K–$1.2M for airlift mitigation alone, scaled by event magnitude).

actual_n95_staging_share.rationale: Base centered at the 30% T+16 staging target per the actual-vs-commitment default. Asymmetric downside captures the airborne-visibility grounding scenario from Premortem (visibility < 1.2 mi grounds the entire airlift); upside reflects 10 CH-47 sorties × payload performing as planned.

actual_c2_fuel_endurance_hours.rationale: Base 60 hours sits below the 72-hour target — base-case gate failure. Anchored on Expert Issue 2: UPS-only baseline is 24 hours without engineering diversion to fuel caches. The Critical verdict on this gate is bounds-driven, not stochastic.

actual_public_compliance_share.rationale: IPAWS reach × Decision-8 messaging effectiveness × historical Yellowstone-area evacuation rates; base just above the 70% panic-floor threshold reflects realistic execution under Decision-8 Choice-1 messaging.
